summary: Add Portfolio as a fifth frontend theme inspired by a neon developer portfolio reference.
assumptions: Portfolio is a new fifth theme and does not replace Terminal or any existing theme.
The persisted value is portfolio and the display name is Portfolio.
Portfolio keeps dark-mode base behavior by applying both data-theme="portfolio" and the dark class.
Motion is CSS-only, lightweight, and guarded by prefers-reduced-motion.
risks: Toggle cycle could skip portfolio if only the theme picker is updated.
DOM classes could fail to include portfolio while state persists correctly.
Theme picker UI could omit the fifth option.
Token coverage could miss filelist, upload, preview, settings, or trash surfaces.
